data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="苯酚与溴水反应实验" goal="观察苯酚溶液与溴水反应生成白色沉淀的现象" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Phenol_Solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Bromine_Water" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="C6H5OH" volume="5 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="Br2" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_1" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="Br2" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_3" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_4" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_5" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

等待片刻，观察苯酚与溴水反应生成白色沉淀的现象。

老师好！我是标准-学霸。今天的实验是《苯酚与溴水反应实验》，主要目的是通过观察苯酚与溴水反应的现象，验证苯酚分子中的活泼氢可以与溴发生取代反应，并进一步理解苯环的活性和卤代反应的机理。我已经准备好开始实验了！
